title: Youtube poop: Frogsuit vs. Faucet Face
description:
an epic poop!
yes this time Im takeing a brake from Super Mario World and trying out Adventure of Super Mario Bros 3 for poops because someone (Evan) this SMW is getting old. in this story luigi is trying to learn how to read but mario wants to learn haw to dance the classic way but the music sucks @$$ and luigi changes it into something more dance-able mario seems to like it but seems to dance to it TOO long which causes alot of trouble what will happen? watch and find out!

I would like to give all my thanks to StegBlob for takeing the time to record better quality episodes of this show.
